name: av_microservice_gatekeeper
description:
**Release Notes**

 |Version|  Detail|
 |---|---|
 |5.0.21  |Logging issues fixed when logging all even though set to error.  |
 |5.0.12  |Addition of UI endpoints.  |
 |5.0.9  |Upgraded to Java 17.  |
 |4.0.8  |Upgraded to Java 11 and containerised. Added /authorize endpoint.  |
 
 **Introduction**
 
 This microservice acts as a central gatekeeper for calls coming in from a variety of channels. This microservice is used in conjunction with HAProxy.

 If a call from a channel comes in, HAProxy will first do a check to see if the service is currently up and running before forwarding the call to the relevant microservice.
 
 **Caching is also available on the /getMode endpoint and can be set to a certain amount of seconds. This should not be 0 especially not on large sites. Please ensure that the seconds are set in the setting table of the microservice. -> CACHE_LIVENESS_SECONDS**
